title: Mass. 4th grader struck, killed by car
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The 10-year-old girl was hit Saturday in Webster, and a vigil is planned as the community mourns, authorities say.
Marleigh Guevara.
GoFundMe ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: State Police Lt. who oversaw Karen Read investigation retires
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Local News Brian Tully previously commanded the Massachusetts State Police detective unit assigned to the Norfolk County District Attorney’s Office.
State Police Detective Lt.
Brian Tully testified during the Karen Read trial at Norfolk County Superior Court in Dedham on June 13, 2024.

title: Kingston police investigating alleged ‘sexualized’ TikTok convo involving school employee
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The unidentified male is no longer employed by the Silver Lake Regional School District.

Kingston police are investigating a now-former employee of the Silver Lake Regional School District after a video surfaced of him allegedly appearing to have a “sexualized conversation” with a TikTok streamer posing as a 15-year-old girl.
In a statement released Saturday, the police department said it learned of the video on Thursday evening.

title: What players and experts said about Magic’s ‘borderline catastrophic’ loss to Celtics
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Morning Sports Update "It was a horrific coaching job.
" Paolo Banchero and Luka Garza reach for a the ball during the Celtics-Magic regular season finale on April 12.

AP Photo/Mark Stockwell By Hayden Bird April 13, 2026 | 11:37 AM 4 minutes to read A tough night for the Magic: On Sunday, the Celtics scored an unexpected 113-108 win against the Magic despite resting numerous players (Boston dressed only eight against Orlando).

title: Police ask public for help in finding girl, 17, missing from Carver
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The teen, last seen Sunday evening, may be in the Plymouth area, authorities say.
The missing 17-year-old girl.
Courtesy of the Carver Police Department Carver police are turning to the public for help in locating a missing 17-year-old girl who was last seen Sunday evening.

title: One dead after paramotor crashes on South Coast
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News 63-year-old Gary Williams of Rhode Island was found about 15 to 20 feet away from the paramotor, authorities say.
A powered paramotor.
Leo za1 / Wikimedia Commons A 63-year-old Rhode Island man died Sunday morning after a paramotor crash at a Berkley airfield, authorities said.

title: James Hagens looked like he belonged in his NHL debut with Bruins
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins "They used their speed, they were not afraid to make plays, they made a lot of good decisions.

title: State Police trooper accused of child abuse facing more charges
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Local News The unlawful wiretap and violation of abuse prevention order charges stem from incidents that occurred March 10.
Framingham State Police Headquarters.
Photo by John Tlumacki/The Boston Globe A State Police trooper accused of child abuse is facing more charges of unlawful wiretap and violating of abuse prevention order, prosecutors said.
